title: Baroque Works Fans the Flames
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on baroque works fans the flames, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Baroque Works Fans the Flames. As Luffy is gone and the armies clash, Crocodile’s plan appears to be working exactly as intended. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.
